_comment: In-process baseline numbers from `make bench` on Apple M1 Pro, 2026-05-09. Refresh when the reference machine moves more than ~20%. Numbers in ns/op except where noted.
interpretation: These are BeaconGate-internal numbers only. Real Apps Script p50 will be 100–300 ms on top of these floors due to the Google-edge → Apps Script → VPS network leg. The CI gate is in TestPerformanceAcceptanceFloor (engine/transport/appsscript/bench_test.go) which asserts in-process p95 stays under 100 ms.
